title: CIRCE Cohort Expression Schema
description: Language-agnostic schema for OMOP CDM cohort definitions. This schema defines the data model for cohort expressions in the OHDSI CIRCE ecosystem. Implementers in any language should use this schema as the single source of truth. This root schema imports sub-schemas for criteria, vocabulary, groups, strategies, and common types.

CohortExpression.description: Main cohort expression class containing all cohort definition components. A CohortExpression defines a cohort by specifying primary entry events, inclusion rules, cohort exit strategy, and optional censoring.

Title.description: Human-readable title for the cohort definition

PrimaryCriteria.description: Criteria that define cohort entry events

AdditionalCriteria.description: Additional criteria applied to all cohort entry events

QualifiedLimit.description: Limit for qualifying events (events that pass additional criteria)

ExpressionLimit.description: Limit for the final cohort expression

InclusionRules.description: Rules that determine which qualifying events become cohort records

EndStrategy.description: Strategy for determining cohort end dates. Polymorphic: use {"DateOffset":{...}} or {"CustomEra":{...}}

CensoringCriteria.description: Criteria that censor (end) cohort episodes early

CollapseSettings.description: Settings for collapsing overlapping cohort episodes

CensorWindow.description: Window within which censoring criteria apply

PrimaryCriteria.description: Primary criteria that define cohort entry events. Each event is defined by a domain-specific criteria object (e.g. ConditionOccurrence, DrugExposure).

CriteriaList.description: List of domain-specific criteria wrapped in their type name

ObservationWindow.description: Observation window relative to the cohort index date

InclusionRule.description: An inclusion rule determines which qualifying events become cohort records. All rules must be satisfied (AND logic).
